title: Aurora Polaris MVP Policy Decision
description: Minimal policy decision contract for controlled execution, blocking, escalation and promotion.

decision_id.description: Unique identifier of the policy decision.

subject.description: Affected request, task, module action, response or release promotion.

policy_pack.description: Applied policy catalogue or open if not yet specified. Taxonomy remains open.

decision.description: Controlled decision value from the approved control contract.

severity.description: Open severity taxonomy. Final value list is intentionally not closed in the source contract.

rationale.description: Short rationale for the decision without internal reasoning traces.

triggered_rules.description: Triggered rules, thresholds or control points.

requires_human_review.description: True when HITL triggers or incomplete evidence require review.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 date-time timestamp of the decision.
